description_long: This object consists of a small bunch of three bananas resting on a white, rounded base. The bananas are medium-sized, with a gentle yellow color and some brown spots and blemishes visible along their peels, indicating natural wear. The stems are joined at the top, with one stem slightly darker and more pronounced. The bananas curve gently, with their tips extending outward and slightly upward. The surface of the bananas appears smooth but with subtle textural variations and minor bruising. The white base beneath the bananas is slightly rough and uneven, possibly mimicking a piece of foam or a cut fruit section.
description: A small bunch of three yellow bananas with brown spots, resting on a white, rounded base. The bananas are gently curved and show minor blemishes and bruising.
description_view_0: Three bananas are visible from the side, showing their full length and gentle curvature, with the white base supporting them underneath.
description_view_1: The bananas are seen from a more vertical angle, highlighting the joined stems and the way the bananas cluster together.
description_view_2: A side view showing the bananas' tips extending outward, with the white base partially visible beneath.
description_view_3: A top-down view focusing on the stems and the arrangement of the bananas, with the white base forming a ring around the bottom.
attribute_peel_condition: The banana peels show some minor bruising and brown spots, with no visible tears or splits. The surface appears intact but slightly blemished in places.
